response.justification: The candidate is a strong individual contributor with ~18 years of development experience and genuine depth in developer tooling and test infrastructure (test runners, assertion libraries, CI/CD setup, test automation training), which matches the role's technical focus area well. However, this is a people-management role requiring at least 2 years of people management and 3 years of technical leadership, and the resume shows no formal management experience — no direct reports, performance reviews, or team roadmap ownership. Mobile experience is limited to one app-maintenance stint, and there is no evidence of leading organizational change.
strengths: Deep developer-tools and testing-infrastructure experience (test runners, CI/CD, test automation, MCP tooling)
Broad technical range across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems
Demonstrated mentorship and knowledge-sharing (workshops, courses, code katas, open-source projects)
concerns: No formal people-management experience (no evidence of direct reports or performance management)
No demonstrated strategic roadmap ownership or organizational-change leadership
Mobile-platform ecosystem exposure is shallow relative to the role's focus
